fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Trello API Key from the Key field at https://trello.com/power-ups/admin. Do not use the API Secret or an Atlassian API token here.

fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Trello API token generated from the Token link beside your API Key at https://trello.com/power-ups/admin. This is different from the API Secret.

actions.name: add_card_attachment_url
actions.description: Attach an external URL to a Trello card.

cardId.description: Trello card ID or short link.

url.description: URL to attach to the card.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for attaching a URL to a Trello card.

date.description: Attachment creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

attachment.description: A Trello card attachment returned by the REST API.

actions.name: add_card_comment
actions.description: Add a comment action to a Trello card.

cardId.description: Trello card ID or short link.

text.description: Comment text to add to the card.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a Trello card comment.

date.description: Action creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

action.description: A Trello action returned by the REST API.

actions.description: Add a Trello label to a card.

cardId.description: Trello card ID or short link.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a Trello label to a card.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for assigning a Trello member to a card.

actions.name: add_checkitem
actions.description: Add a check item to a Trello checklist.

position.description: List position. Use top, bottom, or a numeric position.

checked.description: Whether the new check item should be created as complete.

position.description: Check item position in the checklist.

checkItem.description: A Trello checklist item returned by the REST API.

actions.name: archive_card

listId.description: Trello list ID that contains the card.

anyOf.description: Card due date in ISO 8601 format.

dueComplete.description: Whether the card due date is marked complete.

card.description: A normalized Trello card returned by the REST API.

actions.description: Archive a Trello list.

boardId.description: Trello board ID that owns the list.

list.description: A normalized Trello list returned by the REST API.

actions.description: Create a Trello board.

board.description: A normalized Trello board returned by the REST API.

actions.name: update_card
actions.description: Update a Trello card by ID or short link.

anyOf.description: Card due date in ISO 8601 format.

position.description: Card position. Use top, bottom, or a numeric position.

items.description: One Trello member ID.

memberIds.description: Trello member IDs to assign to the card.

items.description: One Trello label ID.

labelIds.description: Trello label IDs to assign to the card.

listId.description: Trello list ID to move the card into.

closed.description: Whether the card should be closed.

dueComplete.description: Whether the card due date should be marked complete.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a Trello card.

boardId.description: Trello board ID that owns the card.

listId.description: Trello list ID that contains the card.

anyOf.description: Card due date in ISO 8601 format.

dueComplete.description: Whether the card due date is marked complete.

card.description: A normalized Trello card returned by the REST API.
